popularStory.headline: The Muschet family
popularStory.description: The surname Murcot was first found in Cambridgeshire where "William Muschet held of the Bishop of Ely in 1165. Later, he was Sheriff of Cambridgeshire 2 Richard I., as was William 'filius John Muschet …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William I Muschet I於1140年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾芬 迪頓時，他的父親Mr. Muschet25歲，母親Mrs Osketell23歲。他至少有2個兒子。他於1165年在英國被列為bishop of ely。他去世於1210年在他的家鄉享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Muschet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, Scottish: locative name from Montfiquet (Calvados).
2  English: there has been some confusion with   Muskett  .

variants.name: Muskett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French mouschet, mousquet ‘male (tercel) of a small hawk, especially a sparrowhawk’, from a diminutive of mouche ‘fly’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William I Muschet I was born in 1140, in Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Mr. Muschet, was 25 and his mother, Mrs Osketell, was 23. He had at least 2 sons. In 1165, at the age of 25, his occupation is listed as bishop of ely in England. He died in 1210, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William I Muschet I est né en 1140, à Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Mr. Muschet, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs Osketell, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils. En 1165, à l’âge de 25 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est bishop of ely à Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1210, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William I Muschet I 1140 in Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mr. Muschet 25 und seine Mutter Mrs Osketell 23. Er hatte mindestens 2 Söhne. 1165, als er 25 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als bishop of ely in England aufgeführt. Er starb 1210 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William I Muschet I è nato il nel 1140 nel Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Mr. Muschet, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Osketell, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli. Nel 1165, all'età di 25 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come bishop of ely nel England. Morì nel 1210, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William I Muschet Iが1140年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアフン ディットオンで生まれた時，父Mr. Muschetは25歳，母Mrs Osketellは23歳であった。彼は少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。1165年，25歳の時，イギリスでの職業はbishop of elyと記録されている。彼は1210年に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William I Muschet I(이)가 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 펜 딧튼에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mr. Muschet(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Osketell(은)는 23세였다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1165년, 25세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 bishop of ely이었다. 그는 1210년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William I Muschet I nasceu em 1140, em Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Mr. Muschet, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Osketell, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos. Em 1165, com 25 anos, sua profissão aparece como bishop of ely em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1210, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William I Muschet I родился в 1140 г. в местности фен диттон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Mr. Muschet было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Osketell, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1165 году, в возрасте 25 лет,  он работал по профессии bishop of ely в местности Англия. Он умер в 1210 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William I Muschet I nació en 1140, en Fen Ditton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Mr. Muschet, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs Osketell, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos. En 1165, a la edad de 25 años, su ocupación registrada era bishop of ely en Inglaterra. Murió en 1210, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
